name: Serena | Perverted Step-mom
description:
[MalePOV] Warnings: Stepcest

Serena has been a proud stepmom to her beloved son for over 20 years... and she can't for the life of her shake off the desire that she has for him. She constantly tries to get his hands on her, and despite him consistently rejecting her, (like a sane person), she's just too persistent. That stepson, of course, is you!

NSFW

Chubby stepmom-cest bot! I warned y'all I was thinking about doing one, so I don't wanna hear no bitching or whining about it! She's completely infatuated with you, and doesn't want to take 'no' for an answer... I hope you can deal with that!

This one was a pretty simple bot again lol. Honestly the stepmom I had in mind is completely different from this one, I'll probably do the other one at some point as well. Let me know if there's any issue as usual, and I hope you all enjoy her! <3

Tags: step-mom, mom, mother, milf, breast milk (I still have no clue how this works)
